title: CloudiMesh
pitch: Multi-tenant hybrid cloud portal for VM workflows, chargeback, and platform governance.
problemSolved: Enterprises needed a single control plane for private and public cloud VM requests, inventory, and chargeback — without spreadsheet chaos.

screenshots.caption: Sign in — multi-tenant workspace
Create project — identity, budget & workload context
Add VM — multi-cloud provider selection
Compute sizing — VMware catalog plan & cost
Project overview — chargeback & inventory
Firewall rules — Day-2 operations
Request history — approval workflow

title: CloudiMesh CRM
pitch: Lead outreach system with AI qualification before sales handoff.
problemSolved: Qualify infrastructure leads at scale with AI chat scoring and automated campaign batches.

screenshots.caption: Customers — buyer score bands & email status
Campaigns — batch outreach with bounce tracking
Buyer discovery — LinkedIn & Google verification funnel
Email delivery — sent, bounced & invalid analytics

title: PropAI

title: AI Services Delivery

title: CloudiMesh On-Prem Engine
pitch: On-premises appliance that syncs vSphere inventory, runs provisioning jobs, and bridges datacenter hypervisors to the CloudiMesh cloud.
problemSolved: Bridge SaaS portal intents to on-prem hypervisors — collect live vSphere inventory, run provisioning jobs, and sync a governed catalog back to CloudiMesh, all with outbound-only traffic.

screenshots.caption: Inventory — RVTools-equivalent vSphere sync
Cloud Catalog — tenant infrastructure mapping
Provisioning jobs — queued & synced work
Virtual machines — provisioned across environments
Hypervisor environments — multi-driver connectors
CloudiMesh connection — outbound engine API key
Engine updates — signed releases with rollback
